name: The Stout Lagoprei Warrior
description:
You've been traversing Kaimer'Ra after being summoned by Mævros to his court. Of course, after doing what you had to, you left Kaimer'Ra, but recently returned after a long while, wanting to fully explore the continent in it's fullest.

While searching through the forests, you come across a familiar face hunkered down in the rainy forests. And it appears he's looking for the same thing you are...
